Rythmos® Liquid Detection Sensor

Technical Specification & Installation Reference · Rev 2026

Liquid presence
Leaks alerts
IP67 rated

Overview

Rythmos® Liquid Detection Sensor is a wireless device designed to detect liquid presence in indoor environments, supporting both leak detection and incontinence monitoring in resident spaces.

FUNCTIONS

Detects liquid presence (water or bodily fluids)
Triggers alerts on moisture detection
Supports resident safety and facility protection

Key Capabilities

Liquid
Detection

Detects
water and other liquids

Incontinence
Monitoring

Detects
bed wetting events

Extended
Coverage

Optional
detection rope for larger areas

Wireless
Design

No
wiring required

Rugged
Build

IP67
rated for wet environments

Low
Maintenance

Long
battery life

Hardware Specifications

Dimensions: 34 × 58 × 18 mm
Power Source: 2 × AAA batteries (non-replaceable)
Battery Life: Up to 3–5 years (usage dependent)
Detection Method: Contact-based (liquid detection pins)
Network: Rythmos® Mesh Network
Connectivity Options: Wired LAN (Ethernet), WiFi support
Certifications: FCC · ISED · CE
Installation: Indoor, non-fixed location
Firmware Updates: Over-the-air (OTA)
Management Portal: Rythmos® Care Manager (web + mobile)

System Topology — Liquid Detection Sensor Deployment

Liquid detection sensors should be installed in areas where leaks or spills are most likely to occur, such as under sinks, near toilets, around water heaters, and along pipes or appliances.

Installation Guidelines

Placement

- Install directly on floor or surface where liquid collects first
- Position detection pins downward

Detection Setup

- Place in areas where liquid is likely to accumulate
- Ensure liquid can reach sensor location

Mounting

- Use adhesive base for quick install
- Ensure clean, non-conductive surface

Extended Coverage

- Use detection rope for large areas or equipment
- Route along pipes, edges, or surfaces

Environment

- Suitable for indoor and harsh environments (IP67)
- Avoid oils, chemicals, and corrosive liquids

Power

- Internal battery (non-replaceable)
- No wiring required
